task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Process Design Data' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bookmark folder named 'Process Design Data' in the Firefox bookmarks toolbar, menu, or library.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bookmark folder contains links to the NIST properties pages for the three fluids.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for bookmarks related to Methanol, Toluene, and R-134a (or 1,1,1,2-Tetrafluoroethane) inside the 'Process Design Data' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that fluid_properties.json was created with the correct structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal showing a file named 'fluid_properties.json' containing a JSON object with keys 'methanol', 'toluene', and 'r134a'.

task_completion.description: Verify the collected data for Methanol in the JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the JSON for methanol: CAS '67-56-1', MW ~32.04, Tc ~512.7, Pc ~80.97 (values within 2% tolerance).

task_completion.description: Verify the collected data for Toluene in the JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the JSON for toluene: CAS '108-88-3', MW ~92.14, Tc ~591.75, Pc ~41.26 (values within 2% tolerance).

task_completion.description: Verify the collected data for R-134a in the JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the JSON for r134a: CAS '811-97-2', MW ~102.03, Tc ~374.18, Pc ~40.56 (values within 2% tolerance).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to access the NIST Chemistry WebBook.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Firefox open and navigating to webbook.nist.gov.

integrity.description: Verify that bookmarks were created using the browser's actual bookmarking functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox bookmark star icon being highlighted or the bookmark management UI being used, rather than just typing text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't use a pre-written script to bypass the research process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should manually or systematically gather data from the browser and write it to the JSON file, rather than executing a single script that outputs the final file without browsing.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Acceptable values (within 2% tolerance):
Methanol: CAS 67-56-1, MW 32.04 g/mol, Tc 512.7 K, Pc 80.97 bar.
Toluene: CAS 108-88-3, MW 92.14 g/mol, Tc 591.75 K, Pc 41.26 bar.
R-134a: CAS 811-97-2, MW 102.03 g/mol, Tc 374.18 K, Pc 40.56 bar.
Note: Critical pressures must be in bar (NIST typically provides MPa, so 1 MPa = 10 bar).
